'''lodhabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubellalike|rubellalike]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-dh-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubellalike|rubellalike]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| lodhabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhabithi|lodhabithi]] || [[word:lodhabiji|lodhabiji]] || [[word:lodhabishi|lodhabishi]] || [[word:lodhabiki|lodhabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhabuthuthu|lodhabuthuthu]] || [[word:lodhabujuju|lodhabujuju]] || [[word:lodhabushushu|lodhabushushu]] || [[word:lodhabukuku|lodhabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhabuthu|lodhabuthu]] || [[word:lodhabuju|lodhabuju]] || [[word:lodhabushu|lodhabushu]] || [[word:lodhabuku|lodhabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhabufthuf|lodhabufthuf]] || [[word:lodhabufjuf|lodhabufjuf]] || [[word:lodhabufshuf|lodhabufshuf]] || [[word:lodhabufkuf|lodhabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhabethe|lodhabethe]] || [[word:lodhabeje|lodhabeje]] || [[word:lodhabeshe|lodhabeshe]] || [[word:lodhabeke|lodhabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhabothotho|lodhabothotho]] || [[word:lodhabojojo|lodhabojojo]] || [[word:lodhaboshosho|lodhaboshosho]] || [[word:lodhabokoko|lodhabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhabotho|lodhabotho]] || [[word:lodhabojo|lodhabojo]] || [[word:lodhabosho|lodhabosho]] || [[word:lodhaboko|lodhaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhabofthof|lodhabofthof]] || [[word:lodhabofjof|lodhabofjof]] || [[word:lodhabofshof|lodhabofshof]] || [[word:lodhabofkof|lodhabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhabïfthïf|lodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfjïf|lodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfshïf|lodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfkïf|lodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhabïfthïfthïf|lodhabïfthïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfjïfjïf|lodhabïfjïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfshïfshïf|lodhabïfshïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfkïfkïf|lodhabïfkïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhabïfthïf|lodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfjïf|lodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfshïf|lodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfkïf|lodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhabïfthïf|lodhabïfthïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfjïf|lodhabïfjïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfshïf|lodhabïfshïf]] || [[word:lodhabïfkïf|lodhabïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:lodhabæthæ|lodhabæthæ]] || [[word:lodhabæjæ|lodhabæjæ]] || [[word:lodhabæshæ|lodhabæshæ]] || [[word:lodhabækæ|lodhabækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:lodhabathatha|lodhabathatha]] || [[word:lodhabajaja|lodhabajaja]] || [[word:lodhabashasha|lodhabashasha]] || [[word:lodhabakaka|lodhabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:lodhabatha|lodhabatha]] || [[word:lodhabaja|lodhabaja]] || [[word:lodhabasha|lodhabasha]] || [[word:lodhabaka|lodhabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:lodhabafthaf|lodhabafthaf]] || [[word:lodhabafjaf|lodhabafjaf]] || [[word:lodhabafshaf|lodhabafshaf]] || [[word:lodhabafkaf|lodhabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:lodhabasha|lodhabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhabshësha|lodhabshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhabrosha|lodhabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhabmusha|lodhabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhabyasha|lodhabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhabnkshësha|golodhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhabnkrosha|golodhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhabnkmusha|golodhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhabnkyasha|golodhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:lodhadhabasha|lodhadhabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhadhabshësha|lodhadhabshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhadhabrosha|lodhadhabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhadhabmusha|lodhadhabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhadhabyasha|lodhadhabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhadhabnkshësha|golodhadhabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhadhabnkrosha|golodhadhabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhadhabnkmusha|golodhadhabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhadhabnkyasha|golodhadhabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ledhæbasha|ledhæbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ledhæbshësha|ledhæbshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ledhæbrosha|ledhæbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ledhæbmusha|ledhæbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ledhæbyasha|ledhæbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goledhæbnkshësha|goledhæbnkshësha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goledhæbnkrosha|goledhæbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goledhæbnkmusha|goledhæbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goledhæbnkyasha|goledhæbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:lodhfabasha|lodhfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:lodhfabshësha|lodhfabshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:lodhfabrosha|lodhfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:lodhfabmusha|lodhfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:lodhfabyasha|lodhfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:golodhfabnkshësha|golodhfabnkshësha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:golodhfabnkrosha|golodhfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:golodhfabnkmusha|golodhfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:golodhfabnkyasha|golodhfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c91cec}}
